design.ready.description: Design agent has analysed a Figma design or produced design specs

subscribers.promptTemplate:
The design agent has completed its analysis. Here is the design output:

---
{{message}}
---

Implement this design in code. Follow the specs exactly. When done, summarise what you built.

code.ready.description: Developer agent has finished implementing code changes

subscribers.promptTemplate:
The developer has completed implementation. Review the following changes:

---
{{message}}
---

Check for bugs, security issues, code style, and suggest improvements. Use /code-review if available.

review.done.description: Code reviewer has approved or provided feedback

subscribers.promptTemplate:
Code review is complete. Here are the review results:

---
{{message}}
---

Write and run tests for the described changes. Verify the implementation matches the original design intent.
